name: Sales by Pay Type
description: Sales totals for 15 employees across three pay structures — small 3-group comparison (Ch. 22 ANOVA).
studyDescription: Total sales for 15 employees, each paid under one of three structures: commission only, fixed salary, or commission plus salary. A small observational comparison of sales across pay structures.

variableDescriptions.sales: Total sales recorded for the employee.
variableDescriptions.pay_type: Pay structure: Commission, Fixed Salary, or Commission Plus Salary.

sourceDetail: Coursepack (Stat 145). NOTE: a small sales-by-pay-structure dataset with THREE groups, NOT carData::Salaries (faculty).
